title: Rating

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the SourceOS spec this record conforms to.

targetId.description: URN of the object being rated.

rater.description: URN of the subject who submitted this rating.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the rating was submitted.

description: A numeric quality or usefulness rating applied by a subject to any addressable platform object, supporting collaborative curation and discovery.
